name: Feature request

---

## Problem to solve

What is difficult today for the editor, client, or developer?

## Proposed solution

Describe the improvement you want.

## UX impact

Explain how this helps non-technical editors or improves the publishing experience.

## Additional context

Add examples, references, or mockups if helpful.
